failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the availability constraint and planned a search that included unavailable products instead of restricting the catalog query to available items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner, so availability is a key constraint. At index 1, the Coordinator planned to search with available_only=false and explicitly described this as identifying the cheapest option regardless of current availability. That plan optimizes for cheapest vacuum cleaner overall, not cheapest available vacuum cleaner. The later tool result happened to have an available item first, but the root misunderstanding was already present and was not corrected.
